title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind has developed the Deep research API, which enables the creation of agents powered by Gemini to perform comprehensive research tasks. The API allows developers to implement these DeepMind-developed techniques in their applications through Google Cloud.
writeup: The video covers the Deep Research API from Google DeepMind, which lets developers build Gemini-powered agents that carry out comprehensive research tasks. It matters because it packages DeepMind-developed research techniques for use in applications through Google Cloud. The key takeaway: developers can implement these capabilities in their own apps via the API.
